india_trends.summary: Vedanta is replacing its mandatory 30% profit-distribution rule with a discretionary, board-driven dividend policy as it prepares to split into five entities, eliminating the predictable yield that attracted income-focused investors.&nbsp;

india_trends.summary: The war forced changes on quite a few fronts. First was a re-assessment of the “new-normal” for crude and on certain commodities where supply impacts were felt. india_trends.title: Cabinet to soon approve Rs 37,500 cr incentive scheme to promote coal gasification projects
